vocab.meaning: cách thức kín đáo, không gây phiền toái
vocab.example: Checking a wrist watch is a much more unobtrusive way to keep track of time during a meeting than pulling out a bulky smartphone.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng của vật gia bảo (có giá trị lưu truyền)
vocab.example: I believe wearing a watch is important because many pieces possess an heirloom quality, carrying sentimental value across generations.

vocab.meaning: một biểu tượng của sự kỷ luật
vocab.example: For many, a watch is not just a tool, but a badge of discipline that signals one's commitment to a rigorous schedule.

vocab.meaning: sự chế tác đồng hồ tinh xảo
vocab.example: Wearing a traditional timepiece allows one to carry a masterpiece of horological craftsmanship on their wrist every day.

vocab.meaning: có ý thức về phép lịch sự/nghi thức
vocab.example: In formal settings, being etiquette-conscious means relying on a watch to stay on schedule without appearing distracted by digital devices.
